data.body: ddbe COMMITTED + PUSHED to Gerrit change 558 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/558). Change-Id I6a83626. Trailers OK (rebar-ticket ddbe, DCO Joe Oakhart, Co-Authored-By).
